title: Curse For The Worse
description: A collection of curses that can be accessed and turned on via commands. Including the curses of unable to touch water or fire, or ones where hitting mobs causes other bad stuff to happen. Enjoy the mod!
body:
A mod that adds plenty of new curses to the players, which you can set to individual people.

**-Curse of water**_, can't touch water, otherwise you will get the withering effect, gotta get out of there as quick as possible!_ **/cursewater**

**-Curse of fire**_, can't touch lava or fire, otherwise you will explode instantly, leaving nothing left behind, try avoiding the nether :)._ **/cursefire**

**-Curse of wood**_, although being able to stand on it, anything related to wood, other than functional utility blocks, make the player take damage from simply holding, avoid wood items, or tools._ **/cursewood**

**-Curse of villages**_, making it impossible for the player to have a good time in the village, causing a raid to happen any time the player is inside the village._ **/cursevillages**

**-Curse of mobs**_, anytime the player hits a mob, bad things spawn from it and is most likely bad to the player, try avoiding hitting mobs with this on, no more normal minecraft sessions._ **/cursemobs**

**-Curse of ghosts**_, if a player, kills passive mobs of the following-Sheep, Cow, Pig, Chicken-. Then custom ghost version of those mobs give the player an effect and almost forever follow them, never leaving them alone._ **/curseghosts**

**-Curse of the night**_, whenever it turns nighttime, the player gets the darkness effect and dozens of eye particles spawn around them, as if they were being watched in the pitch black dark._ **/cursenight**

**-Curse of projectiles**_, anytime the player holds an arrow, or trident or bow, or anything throwable and useable for projectiles, then it would be disentegrated on hold, avoid holding precious throwables, like tridents, or ender pearls._ **/curseprojectiles**

**-Curse of armor**_, wearing armor becomes impossible with this on, if wearing any kind of armor besides heads, skulls or pumpkins, the player will get struck by lightning and simply die_. **/cursearmor**

-Curse of GUI's, every 20 minutes of a minecraft session with this on, it opens a pointless GUI aswell as spawning an illusioner. Making use for the mob.

-Curse of Food. all meat foods in minecraft become impossible to even eat, if held in either off or main hand, the meat will disappear, leaving no trace of it left. With this on, you are going to have to become a vegetarian/vegan.
